MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF STEPHEN NAVARRA, IN PRO PER WITH STEPHEN M. AND ROBYN NAVARRA
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY RUDY BALDERAMA FOR DEFENDANTS GIOVANNI CESTONI AND DOLORES RAMIREZ

THIS CAUSE COMES ON REGULARLY FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE THIS DAY. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT AS NOTED ABOVE. SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS ARE HELD. CASE SETTLED AND PARTIES ENTER INTO A SIGNED AGREEMENT. STIPULATION AND AMENDED STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT OR FOR DISMISSAL OF ACTION ARE SUBMITTED FOR COURT FILING. TRIAL DATE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.

JUDGE PRO TEM IRVING PFEFFER; CLERK CLARK BANAYAD; NOT REPORTED
